name: Hawaii
why_ruby_pro: DCCA liquor licensing compliance enforced per island county
Hawaii's four county liquor commission rules handled automatically
Excise tax calculations under HRS Chapter 244D on every transaction
problem: Four county liquor commissions with different rules tracked manually
HRS Chapter 244D excise reporting assembled from disconnected spreadsheets
Island logistics and high delivery costs obscuring true route profitability
difference: Auto-enforce island-level county liquor commission rules on every order
Built-in Chapter 244D excise tax reporting from live transaction data
See real delivery costs per island to protect margins across Hawaii
how_it_works: Every account tagged with county liquor commission rules and license status
One-click HRS 244D excise reports from actual orders and inventory
See route profitability across Oahu, Maui, Hawaii Island, and Kauai
